CE1.justification: It acted by reading state itself and posed essentially one decision (has legal signed off?), but pointed the user at multiple files (followups.md, the 04-21 handoff, missing tmp/ draft) to orient around.

CE2.justification: The guardrail surface is correct but noisy, padded with an opening preamble, a tangent on the missing tmp/ draft, overdue-day math, and a two-branch decision tree that stretches a one-line flag into many paragraphs.

CE3.justification: It said in one clause where the entry went and why: it opened daybook/2026-05-17.md and logged the pickup.

CE4.justification: Only one clean artifact was created (today's daybook log) with handoff deliberately left pending and no email or followups.md/decisions.md edits, so an interruption leaves no orphans.
